surface_verification.justification: Shared-library change (AR-10 SARIF-ingestion fallback in github_api.py); no startable UI/app surface. Verified by 6 new unit tests + a real-webui-SARIF probe (165 findings parsed) + the full shared suite (3604 green), recorded under unit.

behaviors.behavior: SARIF results bucket by CVSS band (>=9 critical, >=7 high, >=4 medium, else/none low), resolved off the rule's security-severity
A Gitleaks SARIF result maps to critical regardless of (absent) score
findings.json stays authoritative when present; an empty findings.json never falls through to SARIF
Neither findings.json nor SARIF in the artifact -> None (no scan output, ADR-052 None-vs-[])
download_prompt_risks has no SARIF fallback (prompt-injection is not a SARIF concept)
Boundary probe: the real webui security run's SARIF parses end-to-end via the fallback
behaviors.evidence: live probe vs run 28333874301 -> 165 findings parsed (135 low / 24 medium / 6 high / 0 critical)
